title: How to connect your Ring doorbell camera to your smart TV - Engadget
summary: Fire TV offers a straightforward Ring setup whether you're using an actual TV running this OS or a Fire TV Stick. Then, in the Ring app, turn on Ring Alerts and Motion Alerts for your doorbell.
